response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify three distinct segments: two musical performances and one comedic dialogue scene. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Hibike! Koi no Uta' by Hakos Baelz. 3. Identified Song 2 as a cover of 'The Biggest Dreamer' (originally by Koji Wada). 4. Used web search to retrieve the full lyrics for both songs in Japanese and their English translations. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the requested structure and accurate timing data.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two musical performances by Hololive members, interspersed with a comedic dialogue scene involving Hakos Baelz.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz and Ouro Kronii perform the song 'Hibike! Koi no Uta' on a rooftop setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
広い宇宙の数ある一つ 青い地球の広い世界で
小さな恋の思いは届く 小さな島のあなたのもとへ
あなたと出会い 時は流れる 思いを込めた手紙もふえる
いつしか二人互いに響く 時に激しく 時に切なく
響くは遠く 遥か彼方へ やさしい歌は世界を変える
ほら あなたにとって大事な人ほど すぐそばにいるの
ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい 響け恋の歌
ほら ほら ほら 響け恋の歌
あなたは気づく 二人は歩く暗い道でも 日々照らす月
握りしめた手離すことなく 思いは強く 永遠誓う
永遠の淵きっと僕は言う 思い変わらず同じ言葉を
それでも足りず 涙にかわり 喜びになり
言葉にできず ただ抱きしめる ただ抱きしめる
ほら あなたにとって大事な人ほど すぐそばにいるの
ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい 響け恋の歌
ほら ほら ほら 響け恋の歌
夢ならば覚めないで 夢ならば覚めないで
あなたと過ごした時 永遠の星となる
ほら あなたにとって大事な人ほど すぐそばにいるの
ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい 響け恋の歌
ほら ほら ほら 響け恋の歌
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Translation]
Look, the more important someone is to you,
The closer they are.
I just want this to reach only you,
Let the song of love resound.
Look, look, look,
Let the song of love resound.
You notice,
That we are walking even on a dark path,
The moon illuminates our days.
I will never let go of the hand I hold tight,
Our feelings are strong, we swear eternal love.
At the brink of eternity, I'm sure I will say,
The same words, unchanging.
Even then, it's not enough,
It turns into tears, it turns into joy.
Unable to put it into words, I just hold you,
I just hold you.

scenes.description: A comedic dialogue scene where Hakos Baelz interacts with a whiteboard prompt and a chaotic room setting.
Hakos Baelz, Ouro Kronii, and IRyS perform 'The Biggest Dreamer'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Translation]
I wanna be the biggest dreamer
Run through the future and the present at full speed
Yes, I noticed, I'd forgotten my homework
It's one of those mysteries, mysteries, mysteries
"Who am I?"
My knees are scraped from sliding
Even if it hurts, I have to stand up immediately
If I don't, the chance will escape, I know that
Big and bigger, biggest dreamer!
Dreaming is the beginning of everything, that's the answer
I'll fly further than anyone else, piercing through all our tomorrows
Fly to the horizon, those of us who were given wings
To become stronger and bigger, I'll start running too
I could hear it, the countdown, from a long time ago
I'm ready, let's start now, change to zero!
Big and bigger, biggest dreamer!
If you can't believe it, it'll disappear in a blink of an eye
